lines.speaker: Captain Vibia
lines.text: Move along then. I have a lot of work to be doing.

lines.speaker: Captain Vibia
lines.text: Good day to you, adventurer. Do you need something?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No. Just thought I'd come and see how things are going.

lines.speaker: Captain Vibia
lines.text: Things are very well thank you. Prince Itzla has tasked me with keeping an eye on the remaining Emissaries.

lines.speaker: Captain Vibia
lines.text: Swift justice must be dealt if they try anything, but until then, the Prince would prefer we not stir the pot. They no longer pose a real threat now their leaders have gone.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Well, I'm glad to hear all is well. Until next time.

lines.speaker: Captain Vibia
lines.text: Indeed. May the sun light your way, adventurer.
